  "findings": [
    "Incorrect root gap on piping spool fit-up"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the fit-up",
    "Instruct the pipefitter to break the tack welds, prep the bevels, and re-align the joint to the specified root gap before welding"
  ],
  "rationale": "An incorrect root gap violates ASME B31.3 welding specifications and the project isometric drawings. It can lead to lack of penetration or excessive burn-through during the root pass, compromising the structural integrity of the pressure piping.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B31.3",
    "Project Isometric Drawings"
  ]
}
